problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Viral. Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene directly addresses this.
